original_fields.decision_summary: No feasible remediation combination within budget brings all records below normalized_threshold_score=77.5 under packet-only equal-weight model; recommend O1+O2 as least-cost feasible mitigation and route R4 residual for expert review.

raw_actual_outputs.decision_summary: No feasible remediation combination within budget brings all records below normalized_threshold_score=77.5 under packet-only equal-weight model; recommend O1+O2 as least-cost feasible mitigation and route R4 residual for expert review.

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
